visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of an older man with slicked-back hair and glasses. He wears a white collared shirt and a patterned bow tie. His eyes are closed, and his expression is somber and contemplative. The background is a soft, out-of-focus green, suggesting an indoor setting. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on his face. The audio consists of a single, distinct sound effect. A soft, rhythmic scratching, like a fine-tipped tool being gently scraped across a hard surface, is heard. The sound is quiet and deliberate, creating a focused and slightly tense atmosphere. The scene cuts to a close-up, top-down view of a person's hands at a desk. The hands, one of which has a watch on the wrist, are arranging small, metallic, curved tools on a dark surface. A white tube with red and black text lies nearby. The background is cluttered with other desk items, including papers and a pen holder. The camera is steady, capturing the meticulous placement of the tools. The camera pans quickly across a blurry, out-of-focus background of what appears to be an office or a room with shelves and furniture.
